---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: "[BUG] <description>"
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. -->

**Agent Name**
<!-- Which agent is affected? e.g. git-commit-generator -->

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Import the agent skill in TRAE
2. Trigger with specific input '...'
3. See error

**Expected behavior**
<!-- A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen. -->

**Actual behavior**
<!-- What actually happened instead. -->

**Example Input/Output**
<!-- If applicable, provide the input that caused the issue and the actual vs expected output. -->

**Screenshots**
<!-- If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem. -->

**Environment:**
 - TRAE Version: [e.g. 1.0.0]
 - OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14]
 - Agent Version: [if applicable]

**Additional context**
<!-- Add any other context about the problem here. -->
